mechanics.excerpt: This section describes the process involved treating wounds and what happens to characters their wounds are improperly or incompletely treated Deadly: Arm severed (WV 10; Knockout Check at +6 TN: Lost Limb (31 Trait: bleeds every turn] Chest Minor: Broken ribs [WV 2; +1 to all TNs] Serlous: Minor organ damage [WV 4; Knockout Check; +1 to all TNs] Crltical: Major organ damage ad internal bleeding (WV 8; Knockout Check at +2 TN; +2 t0 all TNs; bleeds every minute] Deadly: Chest cavity crushed heart and lungs destroyed [character instantly killed] FAILED TREATMENT character fumbles any treatment roll (i.e.
